cit.basis: Flat 10% corporate income (profit) tax under the Kyrgyz Tax Code.
cit.note: Administered by the State Tax Service (STS). Certain sectors (e.g. mining) have special regimes out of scope for this SME estimator.

sales_tax.note: Turnover-based sales tax on gross revenue; rate varies by activity and by cash vs non-cash settlement. Separate from CIT and VAT.

metadata.caveat: AI-estimated figures pending verification against official State Tax Service publications; not for filing or production use without local validation.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified AI estimates for LedgerField.
Sales tax, VAT, sector regimes, relief and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
